title: FindingNemo Extraction 4: Circulomics Kit
author: Inswasti Cahyani
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bxvwpn7e

steps.title: Follow the manufacturer’s instructions as described here
steps.instruction: Follow the manufacturer’s instructions as described here .

steps.title: Store at 4 o C or...
steps.instruction: Store at 4 o C or continue to UL Library Preparation as per Section " Modified ULK001 ". If only SQK-RAD004 is available, follow library preparation as in Section " Modified RAD004 ". 4 °C, for storage

steps.title: Store at 4 o C or...
steps.instruction: Store at 4 o C or continue to UL Library Preparation as per Section " Modified ULK001 ". If only SQK-RAD004 is available, follow library preparation as in Section " Modified RAD004 ". 4 °C, for storage

steps.title: This protocol is using the Nanobind...
steps.instruction: This protocol is using the Nanobind CBB Big DNA Kit (see Materials).

steps.title: Follow the manufacturer’s instructions as described here
steps.instruction: Follow the manufacturer’s instructions as described here .

steps.title: Store at 4 o C or...
steps.instruction: Store at 4 o C or continue to UL Library Preparation as per Section " Modified ULK001 ". If only SQK-RAD004 is available, follow library preparation as in Section " Modified RAD004 " or "KrazyStarFish (KSF) ". 4 °C, for storage

steps.title: After overnight incubation at room temperature,...
steps.instruction: After overnight incubation at room temperature, quantify the DNA as per "UHMW DNA QC" and check homogeneity by calculating %CV values.
